title: anacampserotaceae
intro: The Anacampserotaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of succulent plants that are native to the Americas. This family is characterized by its unique combination of features, including succulent stems and leaves, and a variety of flower colors and shapes. Anacampserotaceae plants are often found in dry, rocky areas and are highly adapted to conserve water. With around 25 genera and over 100 species, the Anacampserotaceae family is a diverse and widespread group of plants.
